[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001111111 7
1 010110001 4
2 101001010 4
3 001100101 4
4 011111101 7
5 010000011 3
6 010110111 6
7 011000001 3

01 10 010000001 2
12 21 001000001 2
23 32 000110001 3
34 43 000000000 a
45 54 001000000 1
56 65 001100101 4 match 3
67 76 010000001 2
70 07 010000011 3 match 5

02 20 000110111 5
13 31 010000001 2
24 42 001001010 3
35 53 000100001 2
46 64 001001000 2
57 75 000000001 1
60 06 010110101 5
71 17 010000001 2

03 30 010110001 4 match 1
14 41 001000000 1
25 52 001100101 4 match 3
36 63 010110001 4 match 1
47 74 000000010 1
50 05 000100101 3
61 16 011000001 3 match 7
72 27 000000011 2

04 40 000000010 1
15 51 001000001 2
26 62 001111101 6
37 73 010000001 2
[completion]
0 absent
1 03 30 36 63

3 56 65 25 52

none

61 50x
